## What & why


## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes; added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Any adversarial fixtures use **inert** payloads (e.g. `os.system("true")`)
- [ ] Updated [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) for user-facing changes
- [ ] Updated docs (README / policy / Helm chart) if behavior changed
- [ ] Regenerated lockfiles + `THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md` if dependencies changed
- [ ] All commits are signed off — `git commit -s` (DCO)
